tool_args.label: Finance Committee Meeting February 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Finance Committee Meeting February 2022. Metropolitan Transportation Authority. 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY 10004. Tuesday, 2/22/2022, 1:30 - 2:30 PM ET.

tool_args.label: BP 347 Madison Associates, LLC
tool_args.raw_text: BP 347 Madison Associates, LLC or another to be formed special purpose entity ("Developer"), which is owned by Boston Properties Limited Partnership ("Boston Properties")

payload.description: Special purpose entity owned by Boston Properties Limited Partnership for the 347 Madison Avenue Development

tool_args.label: 347 Madison Avenue Development
tool_args.raw_text: Modification of the Agreement with Boston Properties for the Development of the Madison Ave Properties. Compensation: Upfront Payment: $25 million, payable at Lease execution; plus a second upfront payment equal to $21,794,500.00. Annual Base Rent, Percentage Rent, PILOT/PILOST, and On-site Transit Improvements. Estimated PV of approximately $1 billion.

payload.description: Modification of the Agreement with Boston Properties for the Development of the Madison Ave Properties. 99-year triple net lease. $25M upfront payment plus base rent, percentage rent, PILOT/PILOST, and in-kind transit improvements with estimated PV of approximately $1 billion. On-site transit entrance to East Side Access concourse and off-site improvements to Flushing Line at Lexington Avenue/42nd Street station.

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 - Property Acquisition
tool_args.raw_text: Mr. Florio highlighted the item, which is an acquisition of property from the City for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway. The property is located on the east side of Park Avenue mid-block between 124th and 125th Streets, it is currently vacant, and that it will be used as an entrance for the Second Avenue Subway, as well as for an ancillary facility (which includes a substation).

payload.description: Acquisition of property from the City for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway. Property located on east side of Park Avenue between 124th and 125th Streets, to be used as entrance for Second Avenue Subway and an ancillary facility including a substation.
payload.location: east side of Park Avenue mid-block between 124th and 125th Streets

location_normalized.raw_text: east side of Park Avenue mid-block between 124th and 125th Streets

tool_args.label: Bus Procurement - 2020-2024 Capital Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Authorizing Resolution for the Purchase of up to 1,729 buses (952 for NYC Transit and 777 for MTA Bus Company) through multiple solicitations. The remaining 1,729 buses include 1,042 low-floor 40-foot buses, 345 low-floor 60-foot buses, and 342 over-the-road express buses; 485 of the low-floor buses will be all-electric (460 for NYC Transit and 25 for MTABC).

payload.description: Procurement of up to 1,729 buses (952 for NYC Transit and 777 for MTA Bus Company) through competitive RFP. Includes 1,042 low-floor 40-foot buses, 345 low-floor 60-foot buses, and 342 over-the-road express buses; 485 will be all-electric (460 for NYC Transit and 25 for MTA Bus Company). Replaces aging buses that have reached end of 12-year useful life.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: 181st Street Station Elevator Rehabilitation
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT undertook to fully rehabilitate the station elevators at 181st Street Station on the Broadway/7th Ave Line. These elevators are only accessible via the passageway created by the easement noted above. There are two retail units located within the entrance area which are leased out by the Owner.

payload.description: Full rehabilitation of station elevators at 181st Street Station on the Broadway/7th Ave Line, requiring closure of the entire entrance area for 13 months. Includes reimbursement for lost retail rent.
payload.location: 181st Street (Broadway/7th Ave Line) Station entrance within 585 W. 181st Street, NY, NY 10033

location_normalized.raw_text: 181st Street (Broadway/7th Ave Line) Station entrance within 585 W. 181st Street, NY, NY 10033
